name: kun-gui
description: Electron workbench for the Kun runtime (HTTP/SSE)

scripts.dev: npm run build:extensions && npm run build:kun && npm run build:bundled-extensions && electron-vite dev
scripts.build: npm run build:extensions && npm run build:kun && npm run build:bundled-extensions && electron-vite build
scripts.build:kun: npm run build --workspace @kun/extension-api && node ./scripts/ensure-kun-install.cjs && npm --prefix kun run build
scripts.build:extensions: npm run build --workspace @kun/extension-api && npm run build --workspace @kun/extension-react && npm run build --workspace @kun/extension-test && npm run build --workspace create-kun-extension
scripts.test:extensions: npm run test --workspace @kun/extension-api && npm run test --workspace @kun/extension-react && npm run test --workspace @kun/extension-test && npm run test --workspace create-kun-extension
scripts.check:extension-release-gate: npm run build:extensions && npm run build:kun && node --test ./scripts/after-pack.test.cjs ./scripts/check-extension-release-execution.test.mjs ./scripts/pack-bundled-extensions.test.mjs ./scripts/pack-kun-video-editor.test.mjs ./scripts/smoke-packaged-extension-desktop.test.cjs ./scripts/smoke-packaged-extension-appimage.test.cjs ./scripts/smoke-packaged-video-editor-native.test.cjs ./scripts/smoke-packaged-video-editor-desktop.test.cjs ./scripts/verify-extension-native-evidence.test.mjs ./scripts/verify-manual-extension-release.test.mjs ./scripts/write-extension-native-evidence.test.mjs && node ./scripts/check-extension-release-gate.mjs
scripts.pack:kun-video-editor: npm run build:kun && npm run build:bundled-extensions && node ./scripts/pack-kun-video-editor.mjs --require-bundled-identity
scripts.verify:kun-video-editor-package: npm run build:kun && npm run build:bundled-extensions && node ./scripts/pack-kun-video-editor.mjs --verify --require-bundled-identity
scripts.check:extensions: npm run check:extension-schema && npm run check:extension-docs && npm run check:extension-examples && npm run check:extension-release-gate
scripts.dist: npm run build && npx --yes electron-builder@26.8.1 --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.dist:mac: rm -f dist/Kun-*-mac-* dist/DeepSeek-GUI-*-mac-* dist/latest-mac.yml && npm run build && npm run dist:mac:x64:dmg && npm run dist:mac:x64:zip && npm run dist:mac:arm64:dmg && npm run dist:mac:arm64:zip && node ./scripts/generate-mac-latest.cjs dist
scripts.dist:mac:signed: rm -f dist/Kun-*-mac-* dist/DeepSeek-GUI-*-mac-* dist/latest-mac.yml && MAC_SIGN=1 npm run dist:mac:x64 && MAC_SIGN=1 npm run dist:mac:arm64 && node ./scripts/generate-mac-latest.cjs dist
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && npm run dist:mac:arm64:dmg && npm run dist:mac:arm64:zip
scripts.dist:mac:x64: npm run build && npm run dist:mac:x64:dmg && npm run dist:mac:x64:zip
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:extensions && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.web.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.node.json

author: Kun Contributors
